parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ vendor_name: $node['Call Matching Service'].json.invoice.vendor_name, vendor_id: $node['Call Matching Service'].json.invoice.vendor_id || ($node['Call Matching Service'].json.po ? $node['Call Matching Service'].json.po.vendor_id : null), purchase_order_number: $node['Call Matching Service'].json.invoice.purchase_order_number, purchase_order_match: $node['Call Matching Service'].json.purchase_order_match, invoice_number: $node['Call Matching Service'].json.invoice.invoice_number, invoice_date: $node['Call Matching Service'].json.invoice.invoice_date, due_date: $node['Call Matching Service'].json.invoice.due_date, currency: $node['Call Matching Service'].json.invoice.currency, net_amount: $node['Call Matching Service'].json.invoice.net_amount, tax_amount: $node['Call Matching Service'].json.invoice.tax_amount, gross_amount: $node['Call Matching Service'].json.invoice.gross_amount, validation_status: $node['Call Matching Service'].json.validation.status, discrepancy_summary: ($node['Call Matching Service'].json.validation.discrepancies || []).join(', '), override_decision: 'None', attachment_hash: $node['Compute Attachment Hash'].json.attachmentHash, invoice_attachment: '/data/invoices/' + $node['Compute Attachment Hash'].json.attachmentHash + '.pdf', sender_name: $json.body?.sender_name || $json.sender_name || null, sender_email: $json.body?.sender_email || $json.sender_email || null, email_subject: $json.body?.email_subject || $json.email_subject || $node['Set Demo Metadata'].json.email_subject || 'Manual upload check', received_at: $node['Set Demo Metadata'].json.received_at || new Date().toISOString(), confidence_score: $node['Call Matching Service'].json.invoice.confidence_score || 0, extraction_warnings: JSON.stringify($node['Call Matching Service'].json.invoice.extraction_warnings || []), ocr_used: $node['Call Matching Service'].json.invoice.ocr_used || false, low_confidence_reason: $node['Call Matching Service'].json.invoice.low_confidence_reason || '', duplicate_flag: $node['Call Matching Service'].json.duplicate_flag || false, duplicate_type: $node['Call Matching Service'].json.duplicate_type || '', line_items_raw: JSON.stringify($node['Call Matching Service'].json.invoice.line_items || []), validation_results_json: JSON.stringify($node['Call Matching Service'].json.validation.results || []), missing_critical_fields: $node['Call Matching Service'].json.invoice.missing_critical_fields || '' }) }}

string.name: action
string.value: ={{$node['Call Matching Service'].json.validation_status === 'Ready for Payment' ? 'ready_for_payment' : ($node['Call Matching Service'].json.validation_status === 'Rejected' ? 'rejected' : 'routed_to_review')}}

workflowId.cachedResultName: Invo Match - Log Audit Event Sub-workflow

parameters.subject: =Invoice Approved for Payment: {{$node['Call Matching Service'].json.invoice.invoice_number}}
parameters.html:
=

Invoice Approved

Invoice {{$node['Call Matching Service'].json.invoice.invoice_number}} from vendor {{$node['Call Matching Service'].json.invoice.vendor_name}} has passed all automated matching validation rules and is approved for payment.

Gross Amount: {{$node['Call Matching Service'].json.invoice.currency}} {{$node['Call Matching Service'].json.invoice.gross_amount}}

parameters.subject: =Procurement Review Required: {{$node['Call Matching Service'].json.invoice.invoice_number}}
parameters.html:
=

Review Required

Invoice {{$node['Call Matching Service'].json.invoice.invoice_number}} from vendor {{$node['Call Matching Service'].json.invoice.vendor_name}} requires manual review.

Discrepancies: {{$node['Call Matching Service'].json.validation.discrepancies.join(', ')}}

Please log in to NocoDB to review the discrepancies.

parameters.subject: =Invoice Rejected: {{$node['Call Matching Service'].json.invoice.invoice_number}}
parameters.html:
=

Invoice Rejected

Invoice {{$node['Call Matching Service'].json.invoice.invoice_number}} from vendor {{$node['Call Matching Service'].json.invoice.vendor_name}} has been rejected by the automated matching engine.

Reasons: {{$node['Call Matching Service'].json.validation.discrepancies.join(', ')}}
